description_long: This is a small, light blue delivery-style food truck with a boxy cargo compartment mounted on a compact cab chassis. The cab features a simple, utilitarian design with black wheels, a black front bumper, and a windshield with visible framing. The cargo box displays a colorful advertisement with images of fresh produce and the text 'Albert Heijn doet de boodschappen,' suggesting a grocery delivery or food service function. The rear of the truck is plain, with subtle panel lines indicating the back door, while the sides are decorated with food imagery and branding. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with a focus on practicality and clear visual communication.
description: A compact, light blue food truck with a boxy cargo area, black wheels, and colorful grocery-themed signage on the sides.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the truck, the detailed grocery advertisement, and both wheels clearly.
description_view_1: Front angled view highlighting the cab, windshield, and the start of the cargo box with partial signage visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the advertisement and branding fully visible, similar to view 0 but mirrored.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the plain back of the cargo box and the rear bumper, with minimal signage visible.
attribute_signage: Side panel with 'Albert Heijn doet de boodschappen' text and images of groceries.
